parameters.query: SELECT c.id, c.nom, c.email, c.entreprise, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - COALESCE(MAX(rv.date_debut), c.created_at))::int AS jours_sans_contact, COUNT(DISTINCT f.id) FILTER (WHERE f.statut = 'en_retard') AS factures_retard, COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) FILTER (WHERE e.classification = 'reclamation' AND e.traite_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days') AS reclamations_90j FROM clients c LEFT JOIN rendez_vous rv ON rv.client_id = c.id LEFT JOIN factures f ON f.client_id = c.id LEFT JOIN emails_traites e ON e.expediteur = c.email WHERE c.statut = 'actif' GROUP BY c.id, c.nom, c.email, c.entreprise, c.created_at
INSERT INTO churn_scores (client_id, score_risque, niveau, facteurs, diagnostic, actions) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
